title: nigella degenii subsp. degenii
intro: Nigella degenii subsp. degenii, also known as the Balkan fennel flower or fennel flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, and is valued for its potential to soothe digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Nigella degenii subsp. degenii include its ability to aid in the relief of symptoms associated with colds, coughs, and sore throats, as well as its potential to act as an antispasmodic and anxiolytic. Nigella degenii subsp. degenii is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be found in various supplements and formulations.
